description.unified: Charges a total of 2 time(s). On the first attack, moves behind the enemy and deals Physical DMG, knocking them down for [1.8 sec.->1sec]. On the second attack, moves behind the enemy with the highest ATK, dealing Physical DMG, knocking them down for [1.8 sec.->1sec], and increasing Physical DMG taken by [30%->20%] for 4sec.

Removes your harmful effects and puts all allies into [Reading the Wind] state for [10 sec->7sec], increasing ATK and Physical Evasion Chance by [350->300]. When a target in [Reading the Wind] state successfully evades, all allies’ Critical DMG is increased by [3%->2%] for [10 sec.->7sec]. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
Attacks enemies in a circular area around you, dealing Physical DMG and stunning them for 1.8sec. This skill gains an additional [500->800] Physical Defense Penetration.

On Normal Attack, has a [15%->20%] chance to deal additional Physical DMG, stunning the target for [0.6 sec->0.5sec], and increasing Physical DMG taken by [(added) 15%] for 5sec. This skill ignores the target’s damage reduction effects. [(removed) Increases Critical Hit Chance by 150] [(removed) Reduces Physical Defense by 25%]

IV.unified: Stuns damaged enemies for [3 sec.->1 sec.]

dark.unified: On each attack, reduces the target’s Mana by [400->250].
Reduces the target’s Healing Effectiveness by [40%->20%] for [6 sec.->7 sec.]

light.unified: Cooldown of all skills is reduced by 2 sec. [(removed) Normal Attack damage is increased by 25%]

dark.unified: At the start of battle, increases Defense Penetration by 400 for [2 sec->10 sec] and grants immunity to status ailments for 5 sec. The Defense Penetration increase cannot be dispelled.

description.unified: [Tornado Strike] increases the chance of dealing additional DMG by [10%->5%], and if the target is a Hero, deals additional P.DMG equal to {0}% of the target’s Max HP.

dark.unified: On Normal Attack, increases Attack by 3% and Physical Evasion Chance by [30->35] for 10 sec. This effect stacks up to 10 times.
